chunks.content:
Article: How would you best describe Rei Ayanami
[]: How would you best describe Rei Ayanami?             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Fri Jul 17, 2009 11:17 pm To complete the trilogy of threads I guess. So, how would you do it?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jul 18, 2009 12:30 am -Rei Ayanami is an inspiration to those who may suffer from lonely nights. -Rei Ayanami is an iconic sex symbol. -Rei Ayanami is what many otaku wish was real. -Rei Ayanami needs to be in the sun more often. -Rei Ayanami is inspiration to those who draw fan art and those who draw "fan art". -Rei Ayanami is like an itch. Just there but sometimes you feel good when you scratch it. -Rei Ayanami is Still Alive . -Rei Ayanami is like cosplayers. There are many of her and sometimes is worth looking at. -Rei Ayanami is cold as steel and blank as paper. -Rei Ayanami [II] is to Gendo as Peanut Butter is to Resses. I could go on.

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Sat Jul 18, 2009 12:42 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: -Rei Ayanami [II] is to Gendo as Peanut Butter is to Resses.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sat Jul 18, 2009 1:02 am *sitting across from her at table* *burps loudly in her face* "....smells unpleasant..." *farts loudly* "....too much beans...." *calls her stupid* "....I am not...." *.....slaps her face* "....don't do that..." *makes fun of Gendo* "YOU WILL NOT INSULT HIM!!!" *Rei jumps over table and bites my jugular*

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sat Jul 18, 2009 1:12 am Is an emotionless jailbait girl who is actually a clone of Shinji's mom.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaname Langley » Sat Jul 18, 2009 1:33 am 'Doll' The best Description ever

Article: How would you best describe Rei Ayanami
 jailbait girl who is actually a clone of Shinji's mom.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaname Langley » Sat Jul 18, 2009 1:33 am 'Doll' The best Description ever. Now everybody say thanks to our Goddes Asuka

[]:             Quote Post by DanteNeverCry » Sat Jul 18, 2009 3:23 am Kaname Langley wrote: 'Doll' The best Description ever. Now everybody say thanks to our Goddes Asuka

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sat Jul 18, 2009 8:12 am Forcibily autistic! I think that's how Anno described her (alas I have no proof).

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 18, 2009 8:16 am Rei? A good soldier.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Jul 18, 2009 9:02 am A desperately lonely young girl with an ancient soul and an unrequited death wish, she places her self-worth entirely in the hands of others despite her godly potential.

[]:             Quote Post by eva0313777 » Sat Jul 18, 2009 10:43 am the complete opposite of Asuka,which is why i like her and not Asuka

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Sat Jul 18, 2009 11:35 am Rei, an Eva pilot by day......and a hooker by night, named "Angel"

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Sat Jul 18, 2009 12:58 pm Kaname Langley wrote: 'Doll' The best Description ever. Now everybody say thanks to our Goddes Asuka

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Sat Jul 18, 2009 1:14 pm "White Panties"

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 18, 2009 1:25 pm Dartz wrote: "White Panties"

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Sat Jul 18, 2009 1:45 pm Kaname Langley wrote: 'Doll' The best Description ever. Now

Article: How would you best describe Rei Ayanami
: "White Panties"
